name: codex-mimocode
description: Bridge that lets Codex invoke MiMoCode as a specialist coding agent for planning, implementation, and review

interface.shortDescription: Invoke MiMoCode for planning, implementation, and review
interface.longDescription: This plugin exposes MiMoCode as a set of Codex tools: mimo_plan, mimo_implement, mimo_review, mimo_fix_ci, and mimo_resume. Codex can delegate specialized coding tasks to MiMoCode and verify the results.
defaultPrompt: Plan the implementation of this feature
Review the current diff for issues
